name: Phase 8 Control surfaces and action engine requirements matrix

rows.requirement: Control surface definition and view model foundation
evidence: packages/control-surfaces/src/index.ts implements tenant-owned ControlSurfaceDefinition and ControlSurfaceView foundation with versioning, data source, fields, widgets, action slots, drilldowns, saved views, permission requirements, runtime enum guards, duplicate-key rejection, tenant mismatch checks, reference validation, typed malformed DTO validation, and detached output copies.

packages/control-surfaces/src/controlSurfaceDefinition.test.ts covers creation, validation, duplicate fields/actions, action-slot permissions, cross-tenant nested views, runtime-invalid enum rejection, malformed DTOs, field reference validation, and Portfolio/KPI Deviation/Resource Load/CRM Intake/My Work surface descriptions without tenant-specific branches.
tests: npm test -- packages/control-surfaces exit 0: 1 file, 8 tests passed
npm run typecheck exit 0
npm run lint exit 0
node scripts/verify-requirements-matrix.mjs --allow-blocked docs/status/phase8-requirements-matrix.json exit 0
rows.cleanup: No runtime state or external resources are created by P8-001; implementation is pure domain model plus unit tests. Phase 8 fixture reset/readback remains pending for E2E-070/E2E-074/E2E-075.
rows.blocker: P8-001 domain foundation is implemented and unit-tested, but row remains blocked for phase-exit verification until API/read-model integration and structured E2E-070/E2E-074/E2E-075 evidence prove UI/API permissions, reload, and cleanup/readback.

rows.requirement: Control surface data-source abstraction and read DTOs
evidence: packages/control-surfaces/src/index.ts implements createControlSurfaceReadModel with tenant-scoped source records, visible field projection, severity widgets, sourceRefs, drilldown route interpolation, backend-policy override hooks for action/drilldown availability, strict pagination/severity validation, and no execute URL in read DTOs.

packages/control-surfaces/src/controlSurfaceReadModel.test.ts verifies deterministic read DTO construction, read-only users preserving rows without executable mutation paths, precomputed backend policy decisions overriding raw permission-key presence, cross-tenant source-record rejection without leaking private labels, and malformed pagination rejection.
apps/api/src/phase8Runtime.ts builds the deterministic Portfolio Control read model from P7 KPI control signals and P6 resource overload projections.
apps/api/src/app.ts exposes GET /api/control/surfaces, GET /api/control/surfaces/:surfaceId, and GET /api/control/surfaces/:surfaceId/view behind backend control.surface:read permission checks.

apps/api/src/phase8ControlSurfacesApi.test.ts verifies project-manager read DTOs with severity/source refs/drilldowns/action availability, read-only mutation denial without execute URLs, backend policy scope denial when the permission key exists but row target is out of scope, Tenant B isolation, malformed pagination 400 without row leakage, and unknown surface 404 without Tenant A source leakage.
tests: npm test -- packages/control-surfaces/src/controlSurfaceReadModel.test.ts apps/api/src/phase8ControlSurfacesApi.test.ts exit 1 RED: missing createControlSurfaceReadModel and P8 read API routes returned 404

npm test -- packages/control-surfaces apps/api/src/phase8ControlSurfacesApi.test.ts exit 0: 3 files, 19 tests passed
npm run test:integration exit 0: 10 files, 50 tests passed
npm run typecheck exit 0
npm run lint exit 0
rows.cleanup: P8-002 adds read-only DTO/runtime/API state derived from deterministic in-memory P6/P7 projections; /test-fixtures/reset also recreates the P8 runtime, but E2E reload/reset readback remains pending for P8-009.
rows.blocker: P8-002 read DTO/API implementation is complete and covered by package/API integration tests, but row remains blocked for phase-exit verification until E2E-070/E2E-074/E2E-075 prove UI/API readback, reload, permission visibility, and cleanup.

rows.requirement: Action definitions and execution log foundation
evidence: packages/action-engine/src/index.ts implements ActionDefinition, ActionInputSchema, ActionCommandBinding, ActionAuditPolicy, ActionSourceSurfaceRef, and createActionDefinition/validateActionDefinition.
packages/action-engine/src/index.ts implements createActionCommandBindingRegistry with resolve-by-handler, resolve-by-command-type, duplicate rejection, and definition-vs-registry validation.
packages/action-engine/src/index.ts extends ActionExecutionLog with sourceSurface, inputSummary, auditEventIds, permissionTrace, and preconditionTrace while preserving legacy P3/P5/P6/P7 callers.

P8 source-surface logs require permissionTrace, require preconditionTrace for succeeded/failed logs, and require auditEventIds for state-changing succeeded logs even when before is null and after is material.
executeCreateProjectDraftFromOpportunity now emits deterministic auditEventIds plus permission/precondition traces for its in-package governed command compatibility path.

packages/action-engine/src/actionDefinition.test.ts verifies definition creation, duplicate input-field rejection, dry-run policy for risk.accept, verifier-style diagnostics, registry resolution/validation, source-surface log evidence, and strict denial/state-change guards.
tests: npm test -- packages/action-engine/src/actionDefinition.test.ts exit 1 RED: missing createActionDefinition/validateActionDefinition and P8 log evidence guards
npm test -- packages/action-engine/src/actionDefinition.test.ts packages/action-engine/src/projectDraftCommand.test.ts exit 0: 2 files, 8 tests passed
npm test -- packages/action-engine apps/api/src/phase5ScheduleApi.test.ts apps/api/src/phase6ResourcePlanningApi.test.ts apps/api/src/phase7KpiApi.test.ts exit 0: 5 files, 25 tests passed
npm run typecheck exit 0
npm run lint exit 0
rows.cleanup: P8-003 adds pure action-engine definitions/log validation and no runtime/external state. Action execution fixture cleanup/readback remains pending for P8-009 E2E.
rows.blocker: P8-003 action-engine foundation is implemented and package/regression tested, but row remains blocked for phase-exit verification until API execution bindings and E2E-071..075 prove audit/action logs, direct denial, reload, and cleanup/readback.
